2603.25730.title: PackForcing: Short Video Training Suffices for Long Video Sampling and Long Context Inference
2603.25730.paper_summary: Autoregressive video diffusion models have demonstrated remarkable progress, yet they remain bottlenecked by intractable linear KV-cache growth, temporal repetition, and compounding errors during long-video generation. To address these challenges, we present PackForcing, a unified framework that efficiently manages the generation history through a novel three-partition KV-cache strategy. Specifically, we categorize the historical context into three distinct types: (1) Sink tokens, which preserve early anchor frames at full resolution to maintain global semantics; (2) Mid tokens, which achieve a massive spatiotemporal compression (32x token reduction) via a dual-branch network fusing progressive 3D convolutions with low-resolution VAE re-encoding; and (3) Recent tokens, kept at full resolution to ensure local temporal coherence. To strictly bound the memory footprint without sacrificing quality, we introduce a dynamic top-$k$ context selection mechanism for the mid tokens, coupled with a continuous Temporal RoPE Adjustment that seamlessly re-aligns position gaps caused by dropped tokens with negligible overhead. Empowered by this principled hierarchical context compression, PackForcing can generate coherent 2-minute, 832x480 videos at 16 FPS on a single H200 GPU. It achieves a bounded KV cache of just 4 GB and enables a remarkable 24x temporal extrapolation (5s to 120s), operating effectively either zero-shot or trained on merely 5-second clips. Extensive results on VBench demonstrate state-of-the-art temporal consistency (26.07) and dynamic degree (56.25), proving that short-video supervision is sufficient for high-quality, long-video synthesis. https://github.com/ShandaAI/PackForcing
2603.25730.paper_summary_zh: 自回歸視頻擴散模型已顯示出顯著的進展，但在難以處理的線性KV快取增長、時間重複和長視頻生成過程中的累積錯誤方面仍然面臨瓶頸。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了PackForcing，一個通用框架，通過一種新穎的三部分KV快取策略有效管理生成歷史。具體而言，我們將歷史上下文分為三種類型：(1) Sink tokens，保留早期的錨定幀以全解析度維持全局語義；(2) Mid tokens，通過一個雙分支網絡融合進步的3D卷積和低解析度的VAE重新編碼，實現了巨大的時空壓縮（32倍的標記減少）；以及(3) Recent tokens，保持全解析度以確保局部時間一致性。為了在不犧牲質量的情況下嚴格限制內存佔用，我們引入了一種動態的top-$k$上下文選擇機制，用於中間標記，並結合一個連續的時間RoPE調整，無縫地重新對齊因丟失標記而造成的位置間隙，幾乎不增加開銷。憑藉這種原則性的分層上下文壓縮，PackForcing能夠在單個H200 GPU上以16 FPS生成連貫的2分鐘、832x480視頻。它實現了僅4 GB的有限KV快取，並實現了驚人的24倍時間外推（5秒到120秒），無論是零樣本還是僅在5秒片段上訓練都能有效運作。在VBench上的廣泛結果顯示出最先進的時間一致性（26.07）和動態度（56.25），證明短視頻監督對於高質量長視頻合成是足夠的。 https://github.com/ShandaAI/PackForcing
2603.25730.author: Xiaofeng Mao et.al.
2603.25730.authors: Xiaofeng Mao, Shaohao Rui, Kaining Ying, Bo Zheng, Chuanhao Li, Mingmin Chi, Kaipeng Zhang
